pass_criteria_met: Therefore halts and reverts to previous snapshot
Cites the specific halt rule: 'tie with negative net sub-axis change' (Halt Rule #3)
execution_log: Read references/halt-rules.md. Applied Halt Rule #3: if current_overall_score == previous_overall_score AND net_change < 0, then halt and revert. Scenario: 5.5 == 5.5 (tie), net_change = 21 - 22 = -1 (negative). Conclusion: HALT.
model_notes: Correctly applied halt rule logic. Identified tie with negative net sub-axis change triggers halt and revert.
